form.formComment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths win at Casino over 300m (17.11) beating Shamrock Lady in Grade 5 on December 30. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to post a big 4.5 lengths win at Casino over 300m (17.11) beating Shamrock Lady in Grade 5 on December 30. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.38) when seventh over 350m at Q Straight in a Mix 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (19.38) when seventh over 350m at Q Straight in a Mix 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 19.92, beating Weblec Whistler. Last start finished last over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 13 lengths (20.67) behind Electric Cha Cha in a Mix 5 on March 25. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 366m at this track beaten 4 lengths (20.15) behind Rumble Twister in a Mix 5 on March 29. Good beginner who will take catching despite the middle draw.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (20.25) over 366m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 366m at this track. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Recorded a nose win (19.15) in a Mix 5 last time at Q Straight. Goes very well from the draw boasting three places from five starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.
